scripts.build: npm run build:utils && npm run build:core && npm run build:cli
scripts.build:utils: npm run build -w packages/utils-errors -w packages/utils-events -w packages/utils-hashing -w packages/utils-logger -w packages/utils-timezone -w packages/utils-validation && npm run build --workspace=packages/utils-cache-connector --workspace=packages/utils-crm-connector --workspace=packages/utils-document-connector --workspace=packages/utils-email-connector --workspace=packages/utils-erp-connector --workspace=packages/utils-firestore-connector --workspace=packages/utils-journey-connector --workspace=packages/utils-llm-connector --workspace=packages/utils-push-notifications-connector --workspace=packages/utils-realtime-connector --workspace=packages/utils-sms-connector --workspace=packages/utils-survey-connector --workspace=packages/utils-token-handler --workspace=packages/utils-work-mgmt-connector --workspace=packages/utils-address-validation && npm run build -w packages/utils-firebase-event-bridge
